case_title: SHAWN KLIMEK VS. VENY STATE, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-06-2003 CONTINUED TO MAR-10-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
